subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down from the Kingdom of Command unto him who hath taken unto the All-Merciful a way, and it speaketh with truth that there is no [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل من ملکوت الامر لمن اتخذ الی الرحمن سبیلا و ینطق بالحق انه لا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @proclamation to the people of the world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital
